calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2017 Continued To Aug-23-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Mitchell Bruce Greenberg, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Bank of America, N.A.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Highland Hills Lending Group, Inc.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Witness Ana Bonds sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
The legal description is reformed to state; "PARCEL A: Condominium Unit No. 731'" in the place of "PARCEL A: Condominium Unit No. 502'";
Plaintiff is the lawful Beneficiary of the deed of trust ("DOT") recorded on July 13, 2005 as instrument no. 2005-H988878-00 in the official records in the County Recorder's Office of San Francisco County, California;
The DOT has been fully satisfied and is no longer an encumbrance on the Property; and
The recording of a copy of this Judgment in the public records of San Francisco County, California, shall confirm that the DOT on the Property is fully satisfied and deemed reconveyed.

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2017 Continued To Jul-19-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
